Ashwagandha.usage: Take 1 teaspoon with warm milk at bedtime
Ashwagandha.benefits: Reduces stress, boosts energy, improves sleep
Ashwagandha.precautions: Avoid if pregnant, consult doctor for thyroid issues
Ashwagandha.duration: Can be taken for 2-3 months, then 1 month break

Guduchi.usage: Take 2 tablets twice daily with water
Guduchi.benefits: Boosts immunity, reduces fever, liver support
Guduchi.precautions: Take on empty stomach for best results
Guduchi.duration: Can be taken during fever episodes, max 2 weeks

Sitopaladi.usage: Mix 1/2 teaspoon with honey, take 3 times daily

Brahmi.usage: Take 1 capsule twice daily after meals
Brahmi.benefits: Improves memory, reduces anxiety, promotes mental clarity
Brahmi.precautions: May cause drowsiness - avoid driving after taking
Brahmi.duration: Can be taken for 3 months, then 1 month break

Neem.usage: Take 1 tablet twice daily with water
Neem.benefits: Purifies blood, improves skin health, boosts immunity
Neem.precautions: Avoid during pregnancy and trying to conceive
Neem.duration: Take for 2-4 weeks for skin issues
